text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Finally! Today is the day I redeem myself!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... Is it time yet? I wanna run NOW!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Of course not! I've been training hard for this day!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I can't wait to take on all my rivals!
